user_question: gia đình ông/bà NÔNG VĂN THỀ có bị nghèo do thiếu vốn không?

ambiguities: Metric 'household_member_count' được sử dụng để đại diện cho việc đếm các yếu tố trong hộ gia đình vì không có metric chuyên biệt cho 'số điểm thiếu vốn' trong danh sách ứng viên.
query_plan.original_question: Gia đình ông/bà NÔNG VĂN THỀ có bao nhiêu điểm thiếu vốn năm 2024

sql: SELECT households."reason.lackCapital" AS lack_capital, households."family.hostName" AS host_name, households."family.code" AS household_id, households."administrative.district" AS district, households."administrative.commune" AS commune, COUNT(*) AS household_member_count FROM members INNER JOIN households ON members."family.code" = households."family.code" AND members."administrative.year" = households."administrative.year" AND members."administrative.district" = households."administrative.district" AND members."administrative.commune" = households."administrative.commune" WHERE LOWER(households."family.hostName") = 'nông văn thề' AND households."administrative.year" = 2024 AND households."reason.lackCapital" = True GROUP BY lack_capital, host_name, household_id, district, commune

warnings.message: Truy vấn trả về kết quả rỗng.
